description_long: This is a round, wide-mouthed plant pot with a slightly flared rim and two small, rounded handles on opposite sides. The pot is made of a reddish-brown ceramic material, with a matte finish and visible hand-crafted texture. Subtle geometric patterns, possibly etched or painted, encircle the body, giving it a rustic and artisanal appearance. The interior shows some discoloration, suggesting previous use or exposure to soil and water. The pot's form is robust, with a gently bulging midsection tapering toward the base. Its size and shape make it suitable for medium-sized plants, and it would fit well in both outdoor and indoor urban settings.
description: A round, reddish-brown ceramic plant pot with geometric patterns and small side handles, featuring a wide mouth and rustic finish.
description_view_0: The pot is seen from the side, highlighting the geometric patterns and one of the small handles.
description_view_1: This view shows the pot from the front, with a handle centered and the interior discoloration more visible.
description_view_2: The opposite side is visible, showing the other handle and a clearer view of the pot's bulging midsection.
description_view_3: The pot is viewed at an angle, displaying the handle and the continuation of the geometric pattern around the body.
attribute_placement_context: commonly placed on patios or garden paths in residential neighborhoods
